items.name_en: 5BB142, Miu's new bowling bag. The velvet element that is popular this autumn and winter. Top layer of velvet calf leather. The bag is exquisite, three-dimensional, and structured. The front engraved logo echoes the leather color. Removable and adjustable leather long shoulder strap, brand new canvas lining, with a zippered pocket. Many celebrities and influencers are wearing this style. Dimensions 22X10.5X7.5Cm, comes with original packaging.
